title: BEM-531.4 synthetic E2E
objective:
Run script:
"""
artifacts = Path('governance/internal_contour/e2e/bem531_4')
artifacts.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report = Path('governance/reports/bem531_4_synthetic_e2e_report.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem531_4_synthetic_e2e.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
state = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}

records = []
# Minimal E2E: curator -> executor -> result
minimal_cycle = 'bem531-minimal-e2e'
minimal_intake = {'record_type':'intake','cycle_id':minimal_cycle,'source':'gpt','from_role':'curator','to_role':'executor','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(artifacts/'minimal_intake.json'),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:51 (UTC+3)'}
minimal_exec = {'record_type':'execution','cycle_id':minimal_cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'executor','to_role':'curator','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(artifacts/'minimal_executor_result.md'),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:51 (UTC+3)'}
(artifacts/'minimal_intake.json').write_text(json.dumps(minimal_intake, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
(artifacts/'minimal_executor_result.md').write_text('# Minimal E2E executor result\n\ncurator -> executor -> result PASS.\n')
records.extend([minimal_intake, minimal_exec])

# Full E2E: curator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor final -> curator closure
full_cycle = 'bem531-full-e2e'
steps = [
 ('intake','curator','analyst','full_curator_intake.json'),
 ('analysis','analyst','auditor','full_analyst_analysis.md'),
 ('audit','auditor','executor','full_auditor_review.md'),
 ('execution','executor','auditor','full_executor_patch.md'),
 ('audit','auditor','curator','full_auditor_final.md'),
 ('final_result','curator','curator','full_curator_closure.md')
]
for record_type, from_role, to_role, filename in steps:
    path = artifacts/filename
    if filename.endswith('.json'):
        path.write_text(json.dumps({'cycle_id':full_cycle,'record_type':record_type,'from_role':from_role,'to_role':to_role,'status':'completed'}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    else:
        path.write_text('# ' + filename + '\n\nBEM-531 full E2E artifact: ' + from_role + ' -> ' + to_role + ', status PASS.\n')
    records.append({'record_type':record_type,'cycle_id':full_cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':from_role,'to_role':to_role,'status':'completed','artifact_path':str(path),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:51 (UTC+3)'})

with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    for rec in records:
        f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')

state['cycle_id'] = full_cycle
state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 12:51 (UTC+3)'
state['source'] = {'type':'synthetic_e2e','id':'BEM-531.4'}
state['curator_status'] = 'CLOSED'
state['active_role'] = 'curator'
state['next_role'] = None
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-531.4','title':'Synthetic E2E two-level test','status':'completed'}
state['blocker'] = None
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list):
    hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 12:51 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-531.4 minimal and full E2E PASS','minimal_cycle':minimal_cycle,'full_cycle':full_cycle})
state['history'] = hist
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report.write_text('# BEM-531.4 | Synthetic E2E Two-Level Test | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:51 (UTC+3)\n\n## Minimal E2E\ncurator -> executor -> result: PASS.\n\n## Full E2E\ncurator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor final -> curator closure: PASS.\n\n## Artifacts\n`governance/internal_contour/e2e/bem531_4/`\n\n## State\n`governance/state/role_cycle_state.json` updated with cycle `bem531-full-e2e`.\n\n## Transport\nRecords appended to `governance/transport/results.jsonl`.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof.write_text('BEM-531.4 PASS: minimal and full synthetic E2E completed. cycles=bem531-minimal-e2e,bem531-full-e2e.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(transport),str(state_path),str(report),str(proof)])
for item in artifacts.iterdir():
    changed_files.append(str(item))
ops_applied.append('BEM-531.4 completed minimal and full synthetic role-cycle E2E')
"""
No issue comments.
